name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟5️⃣2️⃣0️⃣❤️Limited Edition
The Standard A5 Tote is simple yet eye-catching, featuring a clean silhouette, practical shape, and simple top handle. This A5 version is made of patent calfskin, with a Loe*we logo embossed on the front. Carry by hand*shoulder or crossbody*removable adjustable shoulder strap*internal slip pocket*customizable with shoulder strap and personalized charm*herringbone cotton lining.
size:21*17*6CM
Model:652307( )
